name: Chicken Cordon Bleu
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry chicken breasts. Make a pocket by slitting one side open.
2. Stuff the pocket with 1 slice of ham and 1 slice of cheese.
3. Secure with wooden toothpicks.
4. Mix salt, pepper, flour, and allspice in a shallow dish.
5. Dip each chicken breast into the beaten egg, then coat with cracker crumbs.
6. Heat shortening in a large skillet (preferably cast iron) over medium heat.
7. Brown the breasts for about 2-3 minutes on each side.
8. Reduce heat and add water, then cover and cook until done, about 45 minutes.
9. Remove the lid during the last 2 or 3 minutes to crisp the meat.
